channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Wrench-attack wave hits crypto holders: 88 charged, 75 in pretrial detention. offline risk meets digital assets. 👀 https://Blockchain.News/news/france-charges-88-crypto-wrench-attacks #CryptoSecurity #France #WrenchAttacks
